Soneium

Community Rewards Date

You can now vote on the first Soneium Proposal regarding Community Rewards Date & claim your early participant on-chain rewards. All users who vote within the next 24 hours will receive a Early Adopter badge.

What's New

Introducing Soneium by Sony Block Solutions Labs for the Future of Web3

Aug 23, 2024

for Users

Future of Web3

Soneium integrates Web3 technologies into daily life by creating an internet where creativity and technology converge. Imagine a world where digital interactions are as impactful as real ones, Soneium makes this a reality.

Bridge to Soneium

Coming soon

for Developers

Empowering Innovation

Soneium offers the essential tools and environment to develop your innovative projects. It’s scalable, secure, fast, and cost effective. Developing on Soneium fuels a tech and economic revolution, supporting a sustainable digital ecosystem.

Start Building

for Developers

Empowering Innovation

Soneium offers the essential tools and environment to develop your innovative projects. It’s scalable, secure, fast, and cost effective. Developing on Soneium fuels a tech and economic revolution, supporting a sustainable digital ecosystem.

Start Building

Launch Partners

Soneium leads the way in public blockchain adoption. Immerse yourself in the ecosystem, where developers are creating a decentralised world.

Explore Ecosystem

Built by Sony Block Solutions Labs

Sony Block Solutions Labs was founded by Sony Group Corporation and Startale. Develop an infrastructure that reflects the spirit of Web3. With a focus on practical applications, we aim to establish key uses for this innovative technology.
